allow: Bash(node -e "import\('pdf-parse/lib/pdf-parse.js'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('pdfParse OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('pdfParse FAILED:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('pdf-parse'\).then\(m => console.log\('default import OK, type:', typeof \(m.default || m\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('FAILED:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('pdf-parse'\).then\(m => { console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\('default type:', typeof m.default\); console.log\('is fn:', typeof m.default === 'function'\) }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('pdf-parse'\).then\(m => { const fn = m.PDFParse; console.log\('PDFParse type:', typeof fn\) }\)")
